cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out which book Dave ends up with at the end of the semester. So there are five friends: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a specific book. Let me jot down the initial books first to keep track. Initial books: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: Ulysses - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Now, there are a series
